title: Krieg Unleashes Poison Gas
scene: On pages 1–4, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. Don Krieg prepares poison gas, forcing enemies and allies alike to face the cruelty of his warfare.

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: You can't kill him? That's quite disappointing, gin.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: I always believed you to be my most loyal subordinate,

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Who could adhere to my philosophy of war more than anyone else...

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: The reason why I placed you as the battle commander of my pirate fleet of 50 ships,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: is because your fighting abilities, as well as your willingness to win by any means no matter how vile or despicable,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Was greater than that of any of my subordinates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I know, Don. I really have no intention of betraying you,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Nor do I think what I've done all Arlong was a mistake.

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: I deeply admire your strength, don.

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: You could even say I'm grateful...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I just can't bring myself to kill this man!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Don Krieg...! If it's possible...

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: If there's the slightest chance possible...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Could we please...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Let this ship go...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Gin! How could you...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I've misjudged you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What happened to you, Commander!?

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: You, my most loyal subor- Dinate, dare defy my orders!?

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Have you gone completely out of your mind, gin!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Aghhh! It's the mhs!

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: Put on your masks!

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: This time, it's for real!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That poison gas...!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why that bastard...

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: But Don!

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: We were saved because of this restaurant!

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
